March 22, ,l990
Attention: Col I een McGee
c/o California Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
P. 0. Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804-0807
Dear Col I een:
Enclosed are the original fllings of Form 721 for former (now retired) City
Manager Michael A. Bedwell'and forner Planning Commissioner Eric Richerti As
per our recent telephone conversation, I instructed both of them to complete
and file a combined Annual Statement, covering the entire calendar year of
1989 (fronr January lst through December 3lst) and a Leaving 0ffice Statement.
Mr. Richert's Leaving 0ffice Statement covers the period from January I, 'l990
through February 21, 1990.
Because Mr, Bedwell will still be on the City's payroll (receiving vacation
pay) until July l, 1990, I was not sure as to which date should be used for
his Leaving 0ffice Statement. Based on our discussion and the fact that l"lr.
Bedwell was not acting in an official capacity as City Manager after February
15, 1990, his Leaving office Statement covers the period from January l, 'l990
through February I5, 'l990. Please confirm in writing that I did understand
your directions correctly and did advise both these filers properly.
During our conversation, I also asked for clarification about 1990 fiIing obli-
gations for our new City Manager Jan Dolan. She assumed her position with the
City of Menlo Park on January I5, 'l990 and fiied the appropriate Forn #721/
Assuming 0ffice Statement. It is my understanding that she does not need to
f ile another form until April l, 1991, which wilI cover the period from
January I6, 1990 (day after assuming office) through December 31, 1990.
Please also confirm in writing that I am comect about this filing requirement.
Thank you for your assistance in helping me with these matters.
Sincerely,
f1pTt A4,ur.,
Jaye M. Carr, City Clerk
City of Menlo Park
Enclosures
cc: Jan Dolan, City Manager

sections.question_synthetic: The City Clerk is requesting written confirmation regarding Form 721 filing requirements for retiring officials (Michael Bedwell and Eric Richert) and clarification on 1990 filing obligations for the newly-appointed City Manager (Jan Dolan).
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Incoming request letter from government official (City Clerk) to FPPC, not an FPPC response. No formal QUESTION or CONCLUSION sections present. Contains submission of required forms with requests for confirmation of filing guidance previously provided in telephone conversation.

embedding.qa_text: QUESTION: The City Clerk is requesting written confirmation regarding Form 721 filing requirements for retiring officials (Michael Bedwell and Eric Richert) and clarification on 1990 filing obligations for the newly-appointed City Manager (Jan Dolan).

embedding.summary: This is a correspondence from the City Clerk of Menlo Park to the FPPC submitting Form 721 filings for two retiring officials and seeking written confirmation regarding the appropriate dates for their Leaving Office Statements and future filing requirements for the new City Manager.
